title: pavonia franchetiana
intro: Pavonia franchetiana, also known as Rock Rose or Pavonia, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Pavonia franchetiana include its potential to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms associated with respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Pavonia franchetiana can be found in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
